overview.description: The Franklin Systematic Style Premia ETF (FLSP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed, absolute return fund that aims to produce positive returns in a rising or falling market by employing a multi-asset, long/short strategy via the use of derivatives. FLSP was launched on Dec 18, 2019 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
